title: The Sea Train Project
description: Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Franky, Luffy, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam. Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.

dialogue.speaker: Yokozuna
dialogue.text: RORONOA... you've got guts, looking away.

summary: Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.
